title: onosma lorestanica
intro: Onosma lorestanica, also known as Lorestan onosma or Lorestan gold thread, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to Iran. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Onosma lorestanica include its ability to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory problems, while also exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
